arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva makes Morgan Gibbs-White admission ahead of Forest clash
arts.sum: Fulham manager Marco Silva admits he is content with the fact that Nottingham Forest will be without Morgan Gibbs-White for Saturday's Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest-owned player is way too good to be playing for current loan club - journalist
arts.sum: His future at Forest looks bleak...

arts.ttl: 'We are delighted': Nuno wowed by 'fantastic' Nottingham Forest player who stars on and off the pitch
Nuno Espirito Santo responds to FA investigation after 'unacceptable' incident
arts.sum: Nuno was sent off during Forest’s 2-2 draw at Brighton for his reaction to captain Morgan Gibbs-White’s 83rd-minute dismissal - but he will be in the dugout this weekend

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest want 'incredible' winger who starred at the CG last season
arts.sum: He was in fine form on Trentside...
